title: Stunning High Fashion Editorial Photograph South Asian
sourceTitle: Stunning High Fashion Editorial Photograph South Asian
prompt: A stunning, high-fashion editorial photograph of a South Asian woman in a regal off-white bridal lehenga, adorned with intricate gold embroidery and sequence work. She is positioned behind an ornate, vintage brass candelabra with glowing bulbs that cast a warm, ambient light across her face. The background features grand, classical Mughal-style architecture with arched doorways and delicate latticework. She wears heavy silver and pearl jewelry, including a layered necklace, statement earrings, and a traditional nath, with her hands intricately decorated in dark henna patterns, creating a sophisticated and timeless aesthetic.
